ShortDescription.Value: Tweak landmark attractiveness values directly in-game.

Publish.LongDescription:
### [ALPHA] Customize It
Change landmark attractiveness values right from the game UI.
**IMPORTANT:** Changes take effect immediately, but it can take **5 to 20 seconds** for the updated values to show up in the tourism menu.
- Select any landmark and an **editor panel** appears - **Slider** to set attractiveness from 0 to 500 - One-click **Restore Default** to revert to vanilla values - Changes apply to **all landmarks of the same type** - Overrides are **saved automatically** and persist across game restarts - To close the panel, click on any other building
### Compatibility
- Safe to remove any time. Restore all overrides to default before uninstalling for clean vanilla values. - Does not use Harmony or Reflection; more resilient to game updates. - Avoid running multiple mods that modify landmark attractiveness at the same time.
### Languages
- English, French
tags: landmarks, attractiveness, tourism, customize, tweak
Publish.ChangeLog: * Initial release. * Attractiveness editor panel with slider. * Persistent overrides across saves.
